narrative:
Sagamore Hills Twp B (precinct in Summit County) has 959 registered voters, with 53.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 26.3%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.6 percentage points.
